items.title: GreensKeeper Value Fund Q4 2025 Portfolio Update: Long-Term Winners
items.description: GreensKeeper Value Fund reports a 2025 net return of +0.4% featuring strong gains in Alphabet and American Express. View the full Q4 shareholder update here.

items.title: Earnings live: Nucor stock falls, Baker Hughes rises as Big Tech earnings loom
items.description: The fourth quarter earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with Big Tech results from Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, and Apple headlining the earnings calendar.

items.title: Earnings live: Baker Hughes stock rises as Big Tech earnings come into view
items.description: The fourth quarter earnings season kicks into high gear this week, with Big Tech results from Microsoft, Meta, Tesla, and Apple headlining the earnings calendar.

items.title: Stocks Set for Muted Open After Trump’s Tariff Threats, Big Tech Earnings and Fed Meeting in Focus
items.description: March S&P 500 E-Mini futures (ESH26) are down -0.05%, and March Nasdaq 100 E-Mini futures (NQH26) are down -0.14% this morning, pointing to a muted open on Wall Street as President Trump’s tariff threats against Canada and the looming risk of a partial U.S. government shutdown curbed risk appetite at the start of a busy week.

items.title: Tech Rebound Soothes Greenland-Induced Shivers, Just As Earnings Season Hits Its Stride
items.description: With only 13% of companies reporting thus far, S&P 500 EPS growth for Q4 currently stands at 8.2%. Headline whiplash impacted US markets last week. The tech sector continues to dominate.
